description: Named MCP tool-availability profiles for binary-evaluation ablations. Profiles only affect the analysis agent path; the judge configuration is separate.

core_static.description: Keep the core static-analysis lane (Ghidra, strings, FLOSS, capa) but disable specialty enrichers such as hashdb, sdhash, binwalk, UPX, YARA, model gateway, patching, and artifact writers.

ghidra_only.description: Disable all non-Ghidra MCP servers to measure how much the broader tool ecosystem contributes beyond artifact-backed Ghidra analysis.
